name: claude
description: Local Codex bridge to a Claude Code MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to a local Claude Code MCP server
interface.longDescription: Launch Claude Code as a local MCP server so Codex can use a Claude-oriented tool bridge from this plugin. This plugin requires the Claude CLI to be installed and authenticated on the same machine.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Claude Bridge to connect Codex to a local Claude Code MCP server
